title: About the University | Loughborough University
meta_description: Loughborough is a fantastic place to study and work, boasting unrivalled sporting achievement, internationally acclaimed research and outstanding teaching quality.
headings: h3: Number one in the world for sports-related subjects 10 years running
h3: Awarded eight Queen Elizabeth Prizes for Higher and Further Education
h2: We are making change happen
h2: We integrate innovation to create impact
h2: We are a world-leader in sport
h2: We are committed to inclusion

h2: We're proud of our past
text_excerpt: About the University | Loughborough University Skip to content Skip to primary global navigation Skip to secondary global navigation Skip to site navigation Loughborough University Toggle global mobile menu Search Switch campus: London campus Students Staff Alumni Jobs Study Research and Innovation Sport News and events About About the University Menu University home About the University Our achievements Loughborough campus London campus Our history Research and Innovation Sport Sustainability Our location University Governance Our Strategy Schools and departments Professional services We are Loughborough University Loughborough University is somewhere anyone can realise their full potential. The atmosphere and team spirit on campus inspire and empower people to achieve extraordinary things. This progressive and ambitious attitude is reflected in the success we achieve, as one of the top-performing universities in the country. Loughborough University is also a welcoming place where staff and students should feel they can be themselves. Across everything we do, we are working together to create a better future, for everyone. We are proud to be one of the UK's leading universities Scroll down to next section We strive for excellence Top 10 In the Complete University Guide 2017-2026 Number one in the world for sports-related subjects 10 years running QS World University Rankings by Subject 2017-2026 Awarded eight Queen Elizabeth Prizes for Higher and Further Education Awarded 5 stars for research International QS Stars Scheme 2023 Our achievements reflect this. We are consistently ranked among some of the top-performing institutions in the country and hold an array of awards and accolades that evidence our strong performance across all areas of our delivery, including research, sport, student experience and facilities. More achievements Two outstanding campuses Loughborough campus Our superb Loughborough campus is based in the heart of England and is the University’s most glorious asset. With world-class facilities and plenty of green open space, it has everything our students, staff, and visitors need on site. View Loughborough campus View location on a map London campus Loughborough University London is our incredible postgraduate campus. It's part of an exciting community of organisations, creatives and educational providers located inside Here East, based on Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park. View London campus View location on a map Our Loughborough family Life at Loughborough has a strong community feel. It is a defining feature on both our campuses. It's what makes the experience at Loughborough so special. #lborofamily --> Creating Better Futures. Together Creating Better Futures. Together is a bold and ambitious strategy that will guide the University over the next decade. It sets out our purpose, our values and our aims. It articulates our strategic priorities and what we are striving to achieve. It recognises the impact of our actions on the world around us, and reflects the challenges that face us as a society.​ Our Strategy The Loughborough Experience Loughborough University is well known for offering a life-changing experience, both academically and socially. We deliver innovative programmes that span a broad range of disciplines and we equip our students for every aspect of their life and career, by supporting them to gain vital experience and skills. Employers are impressed by the energy, enthusiasm and competitiveness that Loughborough graduates demonstrate. Study with us We are making change happen At Loughborough we think differently; we challenge convention; we solve problems, and we take action. Through our research we are finding answers, discovering the things that matter and adding to knowledge. Spanning the arts, humanities, business, social sciences, sport, health, science, engineering and mathematics, our research is creating positive change across society. More on our research impact We integrate innovation
